subject: [PATCH v2 7/7] mm: switch deferred split shrinker to list_lru

reviews.author: Johannes Weiner
reviews.summary: The deferred split queue handles cgroups in a suboptimal fashion and list_lru properly sets up per-node, per-cgroup lists. The patch series converts the deferred split queue to use list_lru.

2026-03-12.patch_summary: This patch series switches the deferred split shrinker to use list_lru, which properly sets up per-node, per-cgroup lists and streamlines list operations and reclaim walks.
